description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust wooden handle and a metal head. The handle is straight with a slightly tapered end, showing a natural wood grain and a matte finish. The axe head is forged from dark metal, with a single broad cutting edge and a pronounced poll on the opposite side. The blade has a slightly curved edge and a distinct beard, while the poll is squared and utilitarian. The head is mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fit, with visible wear and patina on both wood and metal. This tool is typical of those found in urban garages, workshops, or maintenance sheds.
description: A hand axe with a wooden handle and a dark metal head, featuring a broad blade and squared poll. The tool shows visible wear and a traditional wedged mounting.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top of the handle, showing the rounded wooden end and the alignment of the head.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the full length of the handle and the profile of the metal head, including the blade and poll.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the top of the head, emphasizing the width of the blade and the thickness of the poll.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the handle and the reverse profile of the head, showing the beard and poll clearly.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical with a slight taper, natural wood grain, no added grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a curved edge and a pronounced beard, squared poll on the opposite side, utilitarian design.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit, metal head fitted onto wooden handle.
